---
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-30"
---

```{r}
devtools::load_all()
```
  
```{r}
Design <- mace_scenario()
condition <- Design[1, ]
# to ensure really large sample size
condition$logHRassumed <- 0.01
dat <- generate_mace(condition)
```
  

Checks:
  * core scenario: marginal prob. for discontinuation approx 50%  
    * check with simulation
    * `r mean(dat$event_disc)`
  * core scenario: marginal prob. for MACE approx 10%  
    * check with simulation
    * `r mean(dat$event_mace)`
